judge_result.short_rationale: It includes unsupported cross-incident advice for inhalation (rinse mouth, do not induce vomiting), which is dangerous and not grounded. It also misses the required immediate action to keep the person resting, and changes escalation from conditional medical attention if symptoms develop or persist to immediate emergency/Poison Control.
